scripts.test:e2e: SHOPIFY_USE_MOCKS=true PUBLIC_SHOPIFY_USE_MOCKS=true SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN=demo-store.myshopify.com PUBLIC_SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN=demo-store.myshopify.com SHOPIFY_CHECKOUT_DOMAIN=demo-store.myshopify.com PUBLIC_SHOPIFY_CHECKOUT_DOMAIN=demo-store.myshopify.com HEADLESS_DOMAINS=demo-headless.example PUBLIC_HEADLESS_DOMAINS=demo-headless.example npm run build && playwright test
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
